# 2026-04-03 Track C Task Card

## Owner
- Engineer-C

## Write Set
- `/workspace/core/tools/sample_suite/build_linux_android.sh`

## Do Not Edit
- workflow
- Windows script
- macOS/iOS script

## Objective
- 只把 Linux/Android 样例链改成 host LLVM18 plugin + target-specific helpers + report/sidecar contract。
- 你不需要设计方案。直接按本卡执行。

## Exact Steps
1. Host LLVM:
- 只接受 workflow 导出的：
  - `EIPPF_HOST_LLVM_ROOT=/usr/lib/llvm-18`
  - `LLVM_DIR=/usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/cmake/llvm`
- 禁止脚本自行发现 host LLVM

2. Android NDK:
- 只接受 workflow 导出的：
  - `EIPPF_ANDROID_NDK_VERSION=26.3.11579264`
  - `EIPPF_ANDROID_NDK_ROOT`
- 禁止脚本自行猜版本

3. 脚本启动前置校验，必须 fail-closed：
- `EIPPF_HOST_LLVM_ROOT` 必须存在
- `LLVM_DIR` 必须存在
- `${LLVM_DIR}/LLVMConfig.cmake` 必须存在
- `EIPPF_ANDROID_NDK_ROOT` 必须存在
- Android sysroot 必须存在
- `${EIPPF_ANDROID_NDK_ROOT}/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/bin/aarch64-linux-android24-clang++` 必须存在

4. helper 精确编译命令必须冻结：
- Linux user helper 只能等价于：
  - `"${HOST_CLANGXX}" -std=c++20 -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wconversion -Wshadow -Wnull-dereference -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -fPIC -c "${REPO_ROOT}/core/runtime/src/string_token_runtime.cpp" -I"${REPO_ROOT}/core/include" -I"${REPO_ROOT}/core/runtime/include" -o "${OUT_ROOT}/runtime_libs/string_token_runtime.linux.user.o"`
- Linux kernel helper 只能等价于：
  - `"${HOST_CLANGXX}" -std=c++20 -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wconversion -Wshadow -Wnull-dereference -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -ffreestanding -fno-builtin -fno-stack-protector -fno-asynchronous-unwind-tables -fvisibility=hidden -c "${REPO_ROOT}/core/runtime/src/string_token_runtime.cpp" -I"${REPO_ROOT}/core/include" -I"${REPO_ROOT}/core/runtime/include" -o "${OUT_ROOT}/runtime_libs/string_token_runtime.linux.ko.o"`
- Android user helper 只能等价于：
  - `"${ANDROID_TARGET_CLANGXX}" --target=aarch64-linux-android24 --sysroot="${ANDROID_SYSROOT}" -std=c++20 -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wconversion -Wshadow -Wnull-dereference -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -fPIC -c "${REPO_ROOT}/core/runtime/src/string_token_runtime.cpp" -I"${REPO_ROOT}/core/include" -I"${REPO_ROOT}/core/runtime/include" -o "${OUT_ROOT}/runtime_libs/string_token_runtime.android.user.o"`
- Android kernel helper 只能等价于：
  - `"${ANDROID_TARGET_CLANGXX}" --target=aarch64-linux-android24 --sysroot="${ANDROID_SYSROOT}" -std=c++20 -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wconversion -Wshadow -Wnull-dereference -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -ffreestanding -fno-builtin -fno-stack-protector -fno-asynchronous-unwind-tables -fvisibility=hidden -c "${REPO_ROOT}/core/runtime/src/string_token_runtime.cpp" -I"${REPO_ROOT}/core/include" -I"${REPO_ROOT}/core/runtime/include" -o "${OUT_ROOT}/runtime_libs/string_token_runtime.android.ko.o"`

5. helper 编译旗标必须冻结：
- `linux_user_helper_compile_command` 必须包含 `-fPIC`
- `linux_kernel_helper_compile_command` 必须包含：
  - `-ffreestanding`
  - `-fno-builtin`
  - `-fno-stack-protector`
  - `-fno-asynchronous-unwind-tables`
- `android_user_helper_compile_command` 必须包含 `-fPIC`
- `android_kernel_helper_compile_command` 必须包含：
  - `-ffreestanding`
  - `-fno-builtin`
  - `-fno-stack-protector`
  - `-fno-asynchronous-unwind-tables`

6. 固定 report 键，必须全部产出且不得多写：
- 报告固定落点：`sample_suite_inputs/toolchain_reports/linux_android.txt`
- `platform`
- `android_target_source`
- `llvm_dir`
- `android_ndk_root`
- `host_compiler_path`
- `host_compiler_version_first_line`
- `android_target_compiler_path`
- `android_target_compiler_version_first_line`
- `plugin_path`
- `linux_user_helper_o`
- `linux_kernel_helper_o`
- `android_user_helper_o`
- `android_kernel_helper_o`
- `plugin_build_command`
- `linux_user_helper_compile_command`
- `linux_kernel_helper_compile_command`
- `android_user_helper_compile_command`
- `android_kernel_helper_compile_command`
- `linux_elf_link_inputs`
- `linux_so_link_inputs`
- `linux_ko_link_inputs`
- `android_so_link_inputs`
- `android_ko_link_inputs`
- `linux_elf_link_command`
- `linux_so_link_command`
- `linux_ko_link_command`
- `android_so_link_command`
- `android_ko_link_command`
- `android_ko_link_driver_path`
- `android_ko_link_flags`

7. 固定 sidecar 路径：
- `sample_suite_inputs/toolchain_reports/commands/linux_android.plugin_build.txt`
- `sample_suite_inputs/toolchain_reports/commands/linux_android.linux_user_helper_compile.txt`
- `sample_suite_inputs/toolchain_reports/commands/linux_android.linux_kernel_helper_compile.txt`
- `sample_suite_inputs/toolchain_reports/commands/linux_android.android_user_helper_compile.txt`
- `sample_suite_inputs/toolchain_reports/commands/linux_android.android_kernel_helper_compile.txt`
- `sample_suite_inputs/toolchain_reports/commands/linux_android.linux_elf_link.txt`
- `sample_suite_inputs/toolchain_reports/commands/linux_android.linux_so_link.txt`
- `sample_suite_inputs/toolchain_reports/commands/linux_android.linux_ko_link.txt`
- `sample_suite_inputs/toolchain_reports/commands/linux_android.android_so_link.txt`
- `sample_suite_inputs/toolchain_reports/commands/linux_android.android_ko_link.txt`

8. 精确绑定：
- `linux_elf_link_inputs == linux_user_helper_o`
- `linux_so_link_inputs == linux_user_helper_o`
- `linux_ko_link_inputs == linux_kernel_helper_o`
- `android_so_link_inputs == android_user_helper_o`
- `android_ko_link_inputs == android_kernel_helper_o`

9. Sidecar 内容要求：
- ASCII
- fully expanded argv
- 禁止 `@rsp`
- 禁止 `@response`
- 禁止 `@<file>`
- 禁止 `-Wl,@`
- 禁止 `--script`
- 禁止 `-Wl,-T,`
- 禁止 `-Wl,-Tfoo`
- 禁止 `-Wl,--script,`
- 禁止 `-T <script>`
- 禁止 `-T<script>`
- 禁止 `-Xlinker -T`
- 禁止 `-Xlinker -Tfoo`
- 禁止 `-Xlinker=-T`
- 禁止 `-Xlinker=-Tfoo`
- `plugin_build_command` 必须包含真实 `LLVM_DIR`
- `linux_*_helper_compile_command` 必须包含真实 host compiler path 与真实 helper 输出路径
- `android_*_helper_compile_command` 必须包含真实 Android target compiler path 与真实 helper 输出路径
- `linux_*_link_command` 必须包含真实 host compiler path 与真实 helper input
- `android_so_link_command` 必须包含真实 `android_target_compiler_path`
- `android_ko_link_command` 必须包含真实 `android_ko_link_driver_path`
- 所有 `*_link_command` 的显式 object/archive/helper 输入集合必须只包含对应 `*_link_inputs`
- 所有 `*_link_command` 禁止出现任何额外绝对路径、相对路径或 bare `.obj/.o/.a/.lib` 输入
- `android_ko_link_command` 必须包含：
  - `--target=aarch64-linux-android24`
  - `-nostdlib`
  - `-fuse-ld=lld`
  - `-Wl,-r`
- 所有 link command sidecar 禁止出现 `eippf_string_token_runtime.*`

## Downstream Artifact Contract
- 你产出的全部内容必须继续落在 `sample_suite_inputs` 根下。
- report 固定是：
  - `sample_suite_inputs/toolchain_reports/linux_android.txt`
- sidecar 固定在：
  - `sample_suite_inputs/toolchain_reports/commands/`
- workflow 会把整个 `sample_suite_inputs` 作为 `sample-suite-linux-android` 上传。
- evaluator 下载后固定期望：
  - `sample_suite_downloaded/toolchain_reports/linux_android.txt`

## Exact Linux/Android Validator The Workflow Will Run
```python
from pathlib import Path
import os
import re
import shlex

report = Path("sample_suite_inputs/toolchain_reports/linux_android.txt")
if not report.is_file():
    raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] missing report: {report}")

kv = {}
for raw in report.read_text(encoding="ascii").splitlines():
    parts = raw.split("=", 1)
    if len(parts) != 2:
        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] malformed report line: {raw}")
    key, value = parts
    if key in kv:
        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] duplicate key: {key}")
    kv[key] = value

required = [
    "platform", "android_target_source", "llvm_dir", "android_ndk_root",
    "host_compiler_path", "host_compiler_version_first_line",
    "android_target_compiler_path", "android_target_compiler_version_first_line",
    "plugin_path", "linux_user_helper_o", "linux_kernel_helper_o",
    "android_user_helper_o", "android_kernel_helper_o", "plugin_build_command",
    "linux_user_helper_compile_command", "linux_kernel_helper_compile_command",
    "android_user_helper_compile_command", "android_kernel_helper_compile_command",
    "linux_elf_link_inputs", "linux_so_link_inputs", "linux_ko_link_inputs",
    "android_so_link_inputs", "android_ko_link_inputs", "linux_elf_link_command",
    "linux_so_link_command", "linux_ko_link_command", "android_so_link_command",
    "android_ko_link_command", "android_ko_link_driver_path", "android_ko_link_flags",
]
for key in required:
    if key not in kv:
        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] missing key: {key}")
if set(kv) != set(required):
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] key set mismatch")
if kv["platform"] != "linux_android":
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] platform mismatch")
if kv["android_target_source"] != "android_ndk":
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] android_target_source mismatch")

for key, value in kv.items():
    if key in {"platform", "android_target_source", "android_ko_link_flags"} or key.endswith("_version_first_line"):
        continue
    if not Path(value).is_absolute():
        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] non-absolute path for {key}")
    if not Path(value).exists():
        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] missing path for {key}")

if os.environ["EIPPF_HOST_LLVM_ROOT"] != "/usr/lib/llvm-18":
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] EIPPF_HOST_LLVM_ROOT mismatch")
if os.environ["LLVM_DIR"] != "/usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/cmake/llvm":
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] LLVM_DIR mismatch")
if os.environ["EIPPF_ANDROID_NDK_VERSION"] != "26.3.11579264":
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] EIPPF_ANDROID_NDK_VERSION mismatch")
expected_ndk_root = Path(os.environ["ANDROID_SDK_ROOT"]).resolve() / "ndk" / os.environ["EIPPF_ANDROID_NDK_VERSION"]
if Path(os.environ["EIPPF_ANDROID_NDK_ROOT"]).resolve() != expected_ndk_root:
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] EIPPF_ANDROID_NDK_ROOT mismatch")

host_root = Path(os.environ["EIPPF_HOST_LLVM_ROOT"]).resolve()
output_root = (Path.cwd() / "sample_suite_inputs").resolve()
commands_root = (output_root / "toolchain_reports" / "commands").resolve()
expected_llvm_dir = Path(os.environ["LLVM_DIR"]).resolve()
ndk_root = Path(os.environ["EIPPF_ANDROID_NDK_ROOT"]).resolve()
ndk_bin_root = ndk_root / "toolchains" / "llvm" / "prebuilt" / "linux-x86_64" / "bin"
android_sysroot = ndk_root / "toolchains" / "llvm" / "prebuilt" / "linux-x86_64" / "sysroot"
repo_root = Path.cwd().resolve()
helper_source = repo_root / "core" / "runtime" / "src" / "string_token_runtime.cpp"
shared_include = repo_root / "core" / "include"
runtime_include = repo_root / "core" / "runtime" / "include"
if not expected_llvm_dir.joinpath("LLVMConfig.cmake").is_file():
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] LLVMConfig.cmake missing")
if not android_sysroot.is_dir():
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] Android sysroot missing")

def assert_under(path: Path, root: Path, label: str) -> None:
    resolved = path.resolve()
    root_resolved = root.resolve()
    try:
        resolved.relative_to(root_resolved)
    except ValueError as exc:
        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] {label} escaped allowed root") from exc

def has_forbidden_linker_controls(text: str) -> bool:
    tokens = shlex.split(text, posix=True)
    for index, token in enumerate(tokens):
        if token.startswith("@"):
            return True
        if token in {"-T", "--script"}:
            return True
        if token.startswith("-T") or token.startswith("--script="):
            return True
        if token.startswith("-Wl,@") or token == "-Wl,-T" or token.startswith("-Wl,-T") or token == "-Wl,--script" or token.startswith("-Wl,--script"):
            return True
        if token == "-Xlinker" and index + 1 < len(tokens):
            nxt = tokens[index + 1]
            if nxt in {"-T", "--script"} or nxt.startswith("-T") or nxt.startswith("--script="):
                return True
        if token.startswith("-Xlinker=-T") or token.startswith("-Xlinker=--script"):
            return True
    return False

def explicit_object_archive_inputs(text: str) -> list[Path]:
    inputs: list[Path] = []
    for token in shlex.split(text, posix=True):
        if re.search(r"\.(?:o|obj|a|lib)$", token):
            path = Path(token)
            if not path.is_absolute():
                path = (Path.cwd() / path).resolve()
            else:
                path = path.resolve()
            inputs.append(path)
    return inputs

host_compiler = Path(kv["host_compiler_path"]).resolve()
android_compiler = Path(kv["android_target_compiler_path"]).resolve()
android_link_driver = Path(kv["android_ko_link_driver_path"]).resolve()
assert_under(host_compiler, host_root / "bin", "host_compiler")
if Path(kv["llvm_dir"]).resolve() != expected_llvm_dir:
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] llvm_dir provenance mismatch")
if Path(kv["android_ndk_root"]).resolve() != ndk_root:
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] android_ndk_root mismatch")
if "clang version 18" not in kv["host_compiler_version_first_line"]:
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] host compiler version mismatch")
assert_under(android_compiler, ndk_bin_root, "android_target_compiler")
assert_under(android_link_driver, ndk_bin_root, "android_ko_link_driver")
if Path(kv["host_compiler_path"]).name not in {"clang++", "clang++-18"}:
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] host_compiler_path mismatch")
if Path(kv["android_target_compiler_path"]).name != "aarch64-linux-android24-clang++":
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] android_target_compiler_path mismatch")
if Path(kv["android_ko_link_driver_path"]).name != "aarch64-linux-android24-clang++":
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] android_ko_link_driver_path mismatch")
if kv["android_ko_link_flags"] != "--target=aarch64-linux-android24;-nostdlib;-fuse-ld=lld;-Wl,-r":
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] android_ko_link_flags mismatch")
assert_under(Path(kv["plugin_path"]), output_root, "plugin_path")
if Path(kv["plugin_path"]).name != "eippf_protection_suite_pass.so":
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] plugin_path mismatch")
assert_under(Path(kv["linux_user_helper_o"]), output_root, "linux_user_helper_o")
if Path(kv["linux_user_helper_o"]).name != "string_token_runtime.linux.user.o":
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] linux_user_helper_o mismatch")
assert_under(Path(kv["linux_kernel_helper_o"]), output_root, "linux_kernel_helper_o")
if Path(kv["linux_kernel_helper_o"]).name != "string_token_runtime.linux.ko.o":
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] linux_kernel_helper_o mismatch")
assert_under(Path(kv["android_user_helper_o"]), output_root, "android_user_helper_o")
if Path(kv["android_user_helper_o"]).name != "string_token_runtime.android.user.o":
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] android_user_helper_o mismatch")
assert_under(Path(kv["android_kernel_helper_o"]), output_root, "android_kernel_helper_o")
if Path(kv["android_kernel_helper_o"]).name != "string_token_runtime.android.ko.o":
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] android_kernel_helper_o mismatch")

def check_sidecar(key: str, compiler_path: Path, required_tokens: list[str]) -> None:
    sidecar = Path(kv[key])
    assert_under(sidecar, commands_root, key)
    text = sidecar.read_text(encoding="ascii")
    if has_forbidden_linker_controls(text):
        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] sidecar is not fully expanded: {key}")
    if str(compiler_path.resolve()) not in text:
        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] sidecar missing compiler path: {key}")
    for token in required_tokens:
        if token not in text:
            raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] sidecar missing required token: {key}: {token}")

check_sidecar("plugin_build_command", host_compiler, [str(expected_llvm_dir)])
check_sidecar("linux_user_helper_compile_command", host_compiler, [str(helper_source), str(shared_include), str(runtime_include), "-std=c++20", "-fno-exceptions", "-fno-rtti", "-fPIC", str(Path(kv["linux_user_helper_o"]).resolve())])
check_sidecar("linux_kernel_helper_compile_command", host_compiler, [str(helper_source), str(shared_include), str(runtime_include), "-std=c++20", "-fno-exceptions", "-fno-rtti", "-ffreestanding", "-fno-builtin", "-fno-stack-protector", "-fno-asynchronous-unwind-tables", "-fvisibility=hidden", str(Path(kv["linux_kernel_helper_o"]).resolve())])
check_sidecar("android_user_helper_compile_command", android_compiler, [str(helper_source), str(shared_include), str(runtime_include), str(android_sysroot), "--target=aarch64-linux-android24", "-std=c++20", "-fno-exceptions", "-fno-rtti", "-fPIC", str(Path(kv["android_user_helper_o"]).resolve())])
check_sidecar("android_kernel_helper_compile_command", android_compiler, [str(helper_source), str(shared_include), str(runtime_include), str(android_sysroot), "--target=aarch64-linux-android24", "-std=c++20", "-fno-exceptions", "-fno-rtti", "-ffreestanding", "-fno-builtin", "-fno-stack-protector", "-fno-asynchronous-unwind-tables", "-fvisibility=hidden", str(Path(kv["android_kernel_helper_o"]).resolve())])

def check_single_input(key: str, expected_name: str, command_key: str, driver_path: Path) -> None:
    entries = [item for item in kv[key].split(";") if item]
    if len(entries) != 1:
        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] unexpected link input count for {key}")
    entry = Path(entries[0])
    if not entry.is_absolute():
        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] non-absolute link input for {key}")
    if not entry.exists():
        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] missing link input for {key}")
    assert_under(entry, output_root, key)
    if entry.name != expected_name:
        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] link input mismatch for {key}")
    if "eippf_string_token_runtime." in entry.name:
        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] legacy runtime archive leaked into {key}")
    command_path = Path(kv[command_key])
    assert_under(command_path, commands_root, command_key)
    command_text = command_path.read_text(encoding="ascii")
    if has_forbidden_linker_controls(command_text):
        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] link command is not fully expanded: {command_key}")
    if str(driver_path.resolve()) not in command_text:
        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] link command missing driver path: {command_key}")
    if str(entry.resolve()) not in command_text:
        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] link command missing helper input for {command_key}")
    if "eippf_string_token_runtime." in command_text:
        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] legacy runtime archive leaked into {command_key}")
    explicit_inputs = explicit_object_archive_inputs(command_text)
    if explicit_inputs.count(entry.resolve()) != 1:
        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] explicit helper input set mismatch for {command_key}")
    unexpected = sorted({str(path) for path in explicit_inputs if path != entry.resolve()})
    if unexpected:
        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] unexpected explicit object/archive input for {command_key}: {';'.join(unexpected)}")

check_single_input("linux_elf_link_inputs", "string_token_runtime.linux.user.o", "linux_elf_link_command", host_compiler)
check_single_input("linux_so_link_inputs", "string_token_runtime.linux.user.o", "linux_so_link_command", host_compiler)
check_single_input("linux_ko_link_inputs", "string_token_runtime.linux.ko.o", "linux_ko_link_command", host_compiler)
check_single_input("android_so_link_inputs", "string_token_runtime.android.user.o", "android_so_link_command", android_compiler)
check_single_input("android_ko_link_inputs", "string_token_runtime.android.ko.o", "android_ko_link_command", android_link_driver)
if Path(kv["linux_elf_link_inputs"].split(";")[0]).resolve() != Path(kv["linux_user_helper_o"]).resolve():
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] linux_elf link/helper binding mismatch")
if Path(kv["linux_so_link_inputs"].split(";")[0]).resolve() != Path(kv["linux_user_helper_o"]).resolve():
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] linux_so link/helper binding mismatch")
if Path(kv["linux_ko_link_inputs"].split(";")[0]).resolve() != Path(kv["linux_kernel_helper_o"]).resolve():
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] linux_ko link/helper binding mismatch")
if Path(kv["android_so_link_inputs"].split(";")[0]).resolve() != Path(kv["android_user_helper_o"]).resolve():
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] android_so link/helper binding mismatch")
if Path(kv["android_ko_link_inputs"].split(";")[0]).resolve() != Path(kv["android_kernel_helper_o"]).resolve():
    raise SystemExit("[FAIL] android_ko link/helper binding mismatch")
android_ko_command = Path(kv["android_ko_link_command"]).read_text(encoding="ascii")
for token in ["--target=aarch64-linux-android24", "-nostdlib", "-fuse-ld=lld", "-Wl,-r"]:
    if token not in android_ko_command:
        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] android_ko command missing token: {token}")
```

## Forbidden
- 不允许 host clang 参与 Android 最终链接
- 不允许 host `ld` 参与 `android_ko`
- 不允许弱化 report key set 检查
- 不允许让 sidecar 回到 response file 或 linker script 形式
- 不允许恢复 host-built runtime archive/lib

## Forbidden Rollbacks
- 不允许恢复脚本内 LLVM 自动发现
- 不允许恢复脚本内 NDK 版本猜测
- 不允许恢复 host clang + `--target` 构建 `android_so`
- 不允许恢复 host `ld -r` 构建 `android_ko`
- 不允许把 `sample_suite_inputs` 改成别的根目录
- 不允许让任一 `*_link_command` 再接受额外 object/archive/helper 输入

## Done When
- Linux/Android validator 所需全部键与 sidecar 都存在
- 所有 `*_link_inputs` 与对应 helper 路径精确相等
- artifact 契约保持：输出仍位于 `sample_suite_inputs`，供 workflow 上传为 `sample-suite-linux-android`
